meta.title: Gal-Code | Custom Coded Web Development
meta.description: Gal-Code custom web development, utilizing the most advanced web technologies. High-end websites with a strong emphasis on proper Google SEO.

hero.title: Gal-Code
hero.subtitle: Custom Coded Web Development
hero.description: Your business deserves much more than just a prompt line, Take your business one step forward using the pinnacle of technology and a human touch.

about.title: About Me
about.academy: a graduate of the Fullstack Developer program at Coding Academy, and also hold a Bachelor’s degree in Economics and Information Systems from Tel-Hai College.
about.whyWeb: I was first exposed to the field of web development toward the end of my undergraduate studies. The feeling that a single line of code could display something tangible on the screen made me connect deeply to web development, the field I chose to specialize in.
about.knowledge: With my professional knowledge, I want to build websites with a solid foundation and proper architecture, designed to reflect each person’s unique taste.
about.difference: The key difference between a website I develop from scratch with clean code and the Off the Shelf website builders is that code-based websites provide faster browsing performance, optimized site structure for search engine ranking, and complete design freedom without being limited by templates.
about.presence: In today’s world, every business needs an online presence, not only on social media. I’m here to walk with you step by step, with professionalism and a smile!

websites.description: From a simple landing page to a full-featured e-commerce store, tailored to your needs.
